creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
What is the status of this PR?  Some time has passed since my last
submission, and people have been inquiring about an update.  Just to
be clear, I don't intend to submit additional revisions to my last
patch under this PR, unless some problem is discovered -- so I would
welcome either a commit or, if there is some problem, a request for
feedback soon.

Regards,

                    b.
